ham.subject: Renewal Notice: Your SaaS Subscription Expires in 3 Days
ham.body:
Hello User,

We hope you’re enjoying the benefits of our SaaS platform. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription (ID: 123456) will expire in 3 days on 2026-04-18. To continue uninterrupted service, please renew your plan before the expiration date.

Click <URL> to review your current plan and make payment.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for choosing us.

Best regards,
The SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is a notification from CryptoSecure Wallet regarding your account. Due to recent suspicious activity, your wallet has been temporarily suspended to protect your funds. To restore access, you must verify your identity within 24 hours. Failure to do so may result in permanent lockout and loss of funds.

Please click <URL> and follow the instructions to verify your account.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact our support at support@cryptosecure.com immediately.

Thank you,
CryptoSecure Support Team
